edgeCases: additive done-branch output: complete.go only adds text after the Workflow-complete line; early-return and non-done branches untouched
deliver --via merge composes existing runMerge (same dispatchSteward + merge --continue); no merge reimplementation, no divergence from merge-steward
no deliver command-name collision in cmd/centinela/
internal/gitutil leaf imports nothing internal; ui->gitutil and cmd->gitutil are leaf reads; no cycle; mapped in centinela.toml + PROJECT.md G2; import_graph exits 0
